Awesome..... that's service with a smile..","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPy5F7TVq20xh7xIx6m4vpTm84qQA1hmbFnHTIZMMq4PsSNXQiaA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I wish all my commercial sub contractors could be as painless and professional as this outfit.  I used Prince Sheet Metals to do the roof of one of my buildings.  I used another to do a larger one, because they were cheaper.  Biggest mistake of my life.  PSM is here in PG, and they take serious pride in their work.  They were prompt, on time, on budget and above all, professional.  I've had 1, count em 1! call back, due to a tiny leak in 10 years, which they handled super quick and painlessly.  The other company-who-shall-not-be-named has been horrible, and any money I saved I paid for in stress and waiting on phone calls and lawyers to get things fixed.

- Claimed they would pull the file back from collections if we paid them, then immediately denied saying that.

The entire ordeal was a complete circus. Dealing with Marathon Eavestroughing was beyond frustrating, and their lack of accountability and professionalism speaks volumes.

title: TO THE PEAK ROOFING INC.
user_reviews: [{"Name":"Blaine Bowe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIawIDRSwiKYEDm_ZL-bsseaFOjs2fhRGNIv1ED_Rh26EI0Vt4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience with To The peak Roofing. Robin and Shawn were both friendly and easy to deal with. I was happy with how quickly they got to my roof after I initially called. The cost was fair and the roof looks great! THANKS GUYS!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDO_sLicg\u0026fid=0x0:0xd56660c387a49be8"],"When":"2022-7-6"},{"Name":"Ronnie VandenBrink","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqHKx9sLdi2mUDF2gjr5F8bWJXUsHE9q8AcQtv-DIelZZ605PS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow!!! Just wow!!! We have needed a new roof for awhile and it was in bad shape. I had quite a few estimates that made me feel sick to my stomach. We knew we had some bad parts to our roof that needed replacing and Robbin came the next day to give his quote and explained what needed to be done, how they would go forward in making the roof leak proof so it will be brand new again. We have a Rancher type house with patio skylights and a dilapidated chimney that he brought to our attention. Robbin gave us the pros and cons of keeping it versus taking it right out. We don't use the fireplace inside as it was wood converted to gas. We talked through the process and decided to have it taken out. Robbins crew were professional, considerate while they were here working. Anytime they had a issue with the roof the crew brought it to our attention so we could make a decision before continuing. They revamped some vents added new ones on the addition, and added new flashing on the skylights. They allowed me to go up and check out the progress as the work was being done. The crew showed up on time and continued to throughout the entire time. I felt confident in the crew workmanship and skill. I would highly recommend To the Peak for they're affordability and working within your budget and needs. They didn't mind our dogs getting in the way sometimes and even gave them some pets and attention while they took breaks. We had some very hot days while the crew was here and offered them cold refreshments in which they were very grateful for. The crew cleaned up each day and took great care to detail to make sure the jobsite was clean and safe. The crew made replacing the roof a pleasant experience. The day after they were done the job it rained and everything was leak proof and gave us peace of mind. Thank you To the Peak 🙏 owner and crew for all your hard work. The roof looks beautiful and brand new again. We are still in awe of how amazing it looks.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Hommy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQI1FUXWDrxFI6tnlYhHY1riIX1fAPwukp9CEF5wLlPH-ssA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"good work done. They said a Day and  half they were quick and got it out in a day. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"M. Spencer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ26FUZoy2oTSHsPmVAPCpU4oPKiRxTTtrmEYZ9pnuYq-PweQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a unique situation of a rodent infestation in the ceiling of a new-to-us home. Finding someone both affordable and willing was a challenge, but after reaching out to countless different companies a friend suggested I try High Tech. As it turned out they were hands down the best company for us. We agreed that since this wasn’t as critical a job as say a flood or fire, I left it in their hands… a job to do when their time allowed, and trusting they wouldn’t leave me in the dust. Not only did the manager Randie remain in good communication throughout the entire waiting period, but they were also fairly quick with a rough estimate. Having to budget for other jobs, I definitely appreciated this. Once on site the job was slightly bigger than anticipated, but the staff did a FANTASTIC job, were quick and efficient, extremely clean AND the management team remained fair to their original quote. This is a company I would hire over and over again. 10/10, would absolutely recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ty L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsAgmXNYnmCCBsEo6WFiPwvckJhhaQwsgCSijfWYJOMRwKgg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Extremely rude to general public. Asked how the worker was doing, he glared at me like I stole his lunch money then looked away without saying a word. I would hope they treat their clients better but personally would not hire them.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCfnYYedQoQOOIOA7yp7GWG&fid=0x0:0xe538adaced719ac0"],"When":"2025-12-5"},{"Name":"Kassidy Gervais","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMrsVG1FTU8sVbTJIQmUvvYQrAUnAGcbNU9DHt16s2Hp4X7g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Never hire high-tech restoration. They are scammers. I had a fire in the basement suite of my rental, all of my stuff upstairs was smoke damaged. It has taken them over a month to “clean” my belongings. I was even told there was “clean” stuff at the smoke damaged house for us to pick up. Why are my cleaned belongings back in the contaminated house. I was told this was an “oversight” so how much of my “cleaned” stuff got re contaminated..

I have gone through over 25 boxes of stuff that was brought to me and not one item was cleaned. High-Tech had the nerve to ask my insurance company for more cleaning dollars after they did not clean any of my belongings. SCAMMERS.

I’ve spoken to the owner about this, James made excuses, did not take responsibility for anything in fact he tried to tell me that my items were cleaned and that he watched them do it. My adjuster and I have caught the property manager Steve in a few lies as well. I would give them negative stars if I could. Take my advice and don’t hire High-Tech.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"M Allan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWElipfDssB-Vg_-4nyeW_MCByWh5vTWW-hr5IX59_U7Hvjrvf1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Been using High Tech for several years to maintain my white carpets! Always on time, personable and efficient. I have always had white carpets and you know you have a good carpet cleaner when they can clean them up. Many others have failed but High Tech always comes through!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICEmveljgE&fid=0x0:0xe538adaced719ac0"],"When":"2019-5-31"},{"Name":"Korry Farquhar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtvqlgHBcyPrFtSAHfVHOIXl19qHdpAqhBBcJqXczJ-Dtq4LBkZg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Our basement started flooding from a broken pipe in December 2024. Our insurance company hired High Tech to do the repairs and it has been nothing but a nightmare to deal with. They have been very disorganized and inefficient. It's now the end of April and they are still not finished. Not to mention the terrible taping and mudding job and the fact that the wrong sized cabinets were ordered and instead of ordering the right size they wanted to rewire the light switches. Which I had to tell them that's not happening, before they ordered another cabinet, which was also the wrong size. Also, they have not shown up for weeks on end with little to no notice of them coming to work when they do show up. If insurance hadn't been covering the cost I would have gotten them to leave and done the work myself.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"A C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJBcXxFdpml522EjelV3ts-dCxRyNa325okYk5rVnWafN_yoUB-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My insurance company hired High Tech to do a tear down and then also hired them to do a rebuild after a flood a year ago. From the start of the job to the end it was a nightmare After a flood, fans are normally installed to dry out the area so mold growth does not happen, they did a walk through decided it was a complete.tear out and therefor decided not to bring any fans in. They actually left my basement soaking wet, for 10 days. By the time they did the tear out it smelled horrible. The entire process was terrible, I would get notified the day of or a day prior, if at all of them coming to do work that I would be needed to be present for. They emailed the wrong email adress, or not at all. They expected me to be available at any time. They were rude, the owner herself is extremely rude. She was so rude and hard to deal with I had to get my mom, half home owner, involved as she is better at dealing with these things. Even my mom had a hard time. I was stressed out. I asked her to communicate with my mom but to cc me in all emails, so she would exclude me. They brought my belongings back from storage too soon, and movers piled items to the ceiling. Which they then expected me to label and sort out where to put these, I have disabilities in my shoulders and back. When they were finishing up my.basement they used my paint samples to do touch ups and told me that the samples.dont match. Then threw a paper at me to sign saying work was satisfactory, paint was still wet so I hadn't noticed they actually used wrong colors to touch up. Without permission to use my paint either. Entire basement needs repainted My bathroom floor has been destroyed and is full of mold and in worse shape then when they started. They told me they had to cut the corner of my wall to fit my cabinet back in place. Which I suspect has caused some water leaking. It was a nightmare, and I'm sure played a part in my heart attack last year. I'm only 42. I could say so much more. This is a company you want to steer clear from. Very disappointed as I used this company in the past, and they were awesome. New owners unfortunately aren't as good","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kalindi Morgan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-sa07fzPhjVpgrPWz_E3eFOaANZdvE3faF2AhP3LamrSfBTm-FA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"They broke a priceless 20 year old picture that my friend had made for me when my Dad died when I was quite young. They lost the growth chart that was up on the wall that we had for both kids for 10 years. Worst of all they told our insurance company that we did not need our cabinets painted, when there is a large section of cabinet still deeply smoke stained despite their cleaning efforts. They neglected to give the insurance company a complete quote for all the work they needed to do when they first were doing the assessment.
They did work quickly, only reason why I am giving them 2 stars and not 1 star","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ben DeKleine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJt0XR8uUI71_j3gNIBv8qQocmFKUUs3loDn4Ymi69NtsOIaQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Services started off great, on-site employees were great, and the work was decent.

However, it has been several months now and I am still finding myself dealing with this situation. It took several weeks to get me an invoice so I could pay them what was owed and then they have the nerve to call me about outstanding balance. They then finally email me an invoice post dated for 3 months ago.

On top of that they still have equipment sitting in my basement despite multiple assurances of "A guy coming to pick it up"","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: KRT Contracting
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ivan Pekunov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUB4N5koOMtz6cwFrwR-N0IlfjqoM0pD2isZFFlghpLN5R1yfs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the moment Terry showed up, it was clear this was not just a “fan install”… this was a masterclass in professionalism, craftsmanship, and good vibes. The crew rolled in like a well-oiled machine — polite, efficient, knowledgeable, and somehow managing to be both laser-focused and genuinely pleasant at the same time (a rare talent).
They installed a new basement bathroom fan with such precision and care that I’m convinced this fan will outlive me, my house, and possibly civilization as we know it. The work was clean, the setup was flawless, and they treated my home with respect — no mess, no shortcuts, no “that’s good enough.” Just done right.
Communication? Excellent.
Punctuality? Nailed it.
Quality of work? Chef’s kiss. 🤌
Professionalism? Off the charts.
If you’re on the fence about who to hire, step off immediately and call KRT Contracting. Terry and his crew are the kind of contractors you tell your friends about, your neighbours about, and possibly strangers in the grocery store about.
Would I hire them again? Without hesitation.
Would I recommend them? Loudly. Repeatedly. Enthusiastically.
KRT Contracting didn’t just install a fan — they installed confidence, airflow, and happiness in my basement. Five stars isn’t enough, but it’s all the system allows","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Titania Montaner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlNdhYqnSR-BIfvPop1Wa8CFHG_HgggadhFzNkguXWZ2UqaXGl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Outstanding work and a trustworthy team

We recently completed a major renovation with KRT Contracting, and I cannot say enough about the outstanding work and the incredible team behind it. From start to finish, they exceeded our expectations in every way.

Terry, the owner, is an exceptional project manager. Every problem within our home that came up along the way—major challenges that were not part of the original plan and that none of us could have foreseen—he found a way to resolve. His dedication, leadership, and ability to keep things moving forward made the entire process smooth.

Quinton, his right-hand man, is also phenomenal. With years of experience, he has the skill and confidence to handle any challenge that arises. The way he and Terry worked together gave us so much confidence that, no matter what unexpected issues were unearthed during the renovations—and some of them were definite doozies—they would be addressed head-on.

Their team completely transformed our home. We now have three beautiful bedrooms and a gorgeous new laundry room on the main floor, as well as a repaired and refreshed basement. What started as “just fixing a wall” in the basement turned into uncovering a much bigger hidden problem with gravel and moisture behind the walls coming in from the great outdoors 🙄. They handled this complex situation with expertise, and by the end, everything was repaired and secure. Along the way, leaks were fixed, HVAC issues were addressed, and it all looks incredible. Their attention to detail is outstanding.

Harrison, who has been here the bulk of the summer, deserves a special mention. His dedication, hard work, and willingness to take on whatever was needed truly impressed us. He was an integral part of bringing this project to completion. Kerry also assisted briefly at the beginning of the project and contributed with professionalism and care.

Another thing worth noting is that even the subcontractors KRT brings in are carefully chosen. They make sure anyone they bring—such as plumbers or other specialists—are vetted thoroughly, because they see those people as a direct reflection of their company. That gave us complete trust in every aspect of the project.

KRT Contracting not only met the timeline we had hoped for (and it was a tight one!) but delivered a home that is now both beautiful and solid. Their commitment, integrity, and craftsmanship are second to none.

We have more work planned for the second floor of our home, and without hesitation, we will be contacting KRT again. We wouldn’t consider anyone else.

We would absolutely recommend KRT Contracting to anyone looking for dependable, skilled, and trustworthy contractors. This is a team that takes pride in their work and truly cares about delivering excellent results.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lynn Blatta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIIU-mjNzgkHRq61hR92UX4XoymQRNGHQ02wF2JzsHMHP37pQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Terry and his crew saved my butt last December when I was all set to move in to a new home which had a pretty major roof leak.  Terry found time to fit me in and took really good care of me.  I have had KRT completely rebuild my roof, repair walls, replace windows and build a gorgeous fence.  They can do anything - he levelled my mobile home and yesterday Dale and Kerry levelled my deck.  Now it can be fixed up and will last for years.  I thought it had to be ripped down.
Terry is super professional and very kind.  Special shout out to Dale and Kerry my two contractors.  These are two hard-working, honest and extremely knowledgeable professionals that can do anything.  They were a pleasure to have around and always went above and beyond.  They are my heroes.
This is the kind of company you want to support because the employees are treated well and they sure as hell deserve it.
Thanks for everything boys.  You are the best.
Lynn, Waggie and Willie","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"M Lab","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiKqQCvwxL0TIJ1Hel03vQXY24me1wRg31gimssku8OnpTMGSK=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I contacted a bunch of contractors after finding out we had some major rot in a wall and needed to tear out our front porch. Terry responded right away, and fit us in despite their busy schedule. They did an excellent job repairing the wall, communicated well, and were friendly and professional the whole way along. Initially they had told me they couldn't build a new porch until the following summer, but when I expressed some concern about not being able to find anyone to do it, they fit that project in too! [{"Name":"Justin Kruger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLCneDuxp5J0_AlH8m417NqsgP9jys3rJ-hIZW3jfhaj2yE8w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"When I first called for a quote on spray foam it was later on Saturday and there was understandably no answer. I did not leave a message and figured I would call back Monday. Within 10 minutes I received a call back (having left no message) from the owner, Dave. He was very helpful and I could tell they would go above and beyond. For them to return a call without me even leaving a message is pretty exceptional service. I have had many contractors never return messages, even just for quotes, let alone be reliable and show up when they say they will.

The crew did a great job! They were professional, fast and did a very thorough job covering all areas to the minimum of agreed upon thickness; most areas were well over. They did a great job cleaning up and made sure we were satisfied before leaving.

We did have a minor issue in regards to total measurements, but they quickly addressed the discrepancies and worked with me to come to a very fair number.

The only negative I would say in the whole experience was that we were not told to leave the house for a min 24hrs until they were already at the house. Luckily we were able to make arrangements quickly. We figured we needed to be out while they were spraying and keep the basement well ventilated afterwards, but not having done any spray foam before we didn’t know for sure.

Overall we had a great experience with Quantum Foam and would work with them again, as well as highly recommend to anyone looking for fast and reliable company!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"J Lundy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJqJE4Ld5hJ9haJHnpiaLGWmW6r3yegKN2PsP7d3IMJxKYZ3g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My garage floor needed lifting in several places- including under the cement stairs. [{"Name":"Vaughn W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJNSbs4fEiL3EkA_T1ZBDP2aTjMn0AvDleBFzmL39eOjbOCpQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Craig (Owner) and Justin were in my neighbourhood looking to sign up new customers. They were both very knowledgeable and took the time to walk me through all of the services they offer. Their rates are very competitive compared to other companies providing similar services.

I signed up for the Mid-Range Full Restore Package, which includes:
•	Manual Roof Demossing
•	Professional Roof Treatment Application
•	2-Year No Moss Grow-Back Guarantee
•	Full Gutter Cleaning
•	Complete Surroundings Clean-Up

I was very impressed with the Shine team’s promptness. Alexei and Justin showed up exactly on time as scheduled. Their vehicles were clean, well-maintained, and organized — which speaks to their professionalism.

The entire treatment took approximately 4–5 hours. Later that evening, I noticed a small section of the house that appeared untreated. I called Craig to explain what I had seen, and without hesitation, he assured me someone would return first thing in the morning.

Once again, the team arrived promptly. They investigated and confirmed that a small spot had been missed. Justin and Alexei were thorough and made sure to double-check everything to ensure I was completely satisfied.

Overall, I am extremely pleased with the service I received from Shine Property Services. I especially enjoyed listening to Craig share his humble beginnings — starting the business out of the back of a Honda Civic and building it into what it is today. I have great respect for young entrepreneurs with such a strong work ethic and determination to succeed.

I truly can’t say enough great things about Shine Property Services. You can’t go wrong hiring Craig and his team for any of their home services.
Thanks again Justin and Alexei !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Topher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLPz7A83w6NKvOQH66vHq1ngzfbt7hVVYC5pQA64kw8V1my9D-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"These guys did an absolutely amazing job on our home,  when i rolled up the driveway i was blown away! [{"Name":"Tiffany Fast","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWoidHl2toMh-93C2hEiANcqsUe6GFcPwMYUtFoxg7WjiAE1xkbTw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing customer service from Kristan today! She went above and beyond to help me with a last minute Christmas gift, and helping find accessories to go with it, even when their store don’t have them, made calls to other stores in town to help me find what I needed! Friendly and caring! Thank you Kristan for your amazing customer service! Merry Christmas to you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jim autotech","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKn7T4pP_OeprXssCsp5MqHnMuoa1wSxBqdG_lIcOgzjAetqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"today i tried to get warranty on a 3/8 flex head ratchet. No such luck. First i was told there no warranty on tools. I was told in the past by princess auto staff there is lifetime warranty on hand tools.  Then i was told i needed my receipt. I was told in the past that all my purchases are under my phone number and i do not need the sales receipt. Third i was told that the best they could do was give me a 13.00 dollar credit. I was treated like garbage and they laughed at me for thinking i could get a new ratchet or a repair kit.  I took my broken ratchet home and will put it on display for pictures on social media with the princess auto logo and there slogan. No sale final until your satisfied.    Update Friday Feb 20. Princess auto has reached out to me and the situation is resolved.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dave Oh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKU5pIe2GLS91hJT_BXSJfX2mXRlk7kfDCN4HioSKUPuAIjag=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I cannot understand how this establishment gets the rating that it does. On numerous occasions, I have checked online for a product I want to purchase, gone into the store, only to find out that it's not in stock. After this happened a few times, I thought I wised up a bit and started to order items online through their website for pick up in-store to save me the wasted fuel, time, and aggravation.

Latest example that happened within the last two weeks of this writing: I see a product I want to buy, and the website shows that it has 6 pieces in stock - it even tells me the aisle it's located in. Great! I go into the store, to that very location - the item is not to be found there or anywhere. I ask an employee (clearly, I've gone through this rigmarole many times before). They verify in their handheld device that there should be stock in the stated location. They apologize (I understand they're just doing their job). They tell me they expect another shipment to arrive in a matter of days, so check the website. I do just that. Fast forward a few days, and I check the website again. It says there are still 6 pieces of the product on so-and-so aisle. So I order online for in-store pickup. A day later, I get an email that says, "Due to inventory limits, we had to cancel one or more items from your Princess Auto Order #..."

Still a few more days later, I try the same thing. Still 6 pieces in stock, so I order online again. By now, I'm totally not expecting my order to be fulfilled, I just want to make a point. Same email again after a full day has passed.

EDIT: I should clarify something important here - when I order that item online, once the order is put through, the inventory count goes down by the number of pieces I ordered. So as it should. But when I get my cancellation notice due to non-availability, the reported quantity in-stock doesn't go down to zero, but back the original 6!!! This happened both times I tried, hence wanting to make this point as an example.

Look, I don't care or even mind if you're sold out of a product. Just say so. I live in town, but other customers do not. It's a huge inconvenience and aggravation when the availability of a product is affirmed in your website but people make the trip to the store to find out that it is not the case. Close your whole store to the public on a stat holiday if you have to and get your inventory in order. I haven't worked in retail in decades, but stores used to do this routinely.

I can attach screenshots of the product in question and my email correspondences, but I think more than a few people can relate.

Your inventory management system is badly broken and someone there in management needs to be held accountable for this! I usually withhold critical reviews on this platform, because when I do find what I need (which I estimate to be about 80% of the time - still quite a dismal statistic), I leave satisfied; I get the products I need/want at prices that cannot be beat elsewhere.

I've never had a bad experience with an employee; they are usually as helpful as they can be under their circumstances. But not saying anything about my all-too-frequent experiences with Princess Auto Prince George would be a disservice to others.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James dunn (Jesse)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEZrr2P2an7dS_lU0EnWMICZ8Q4s0qIxKw63WyZmqF7Lk2Mm67=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The staff is always very helpful in their go out of their way to help you every time. Very nice place to shop. Good prices good inventory if they don’t have it they’ll get it in for you like I said great place to shop.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lloyd Morgan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTd2RaR-FL88kcfIAzej7kLvKoflTGv4e1kb1flIFuUrp-0i0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I bought a little battery for my woodlands sawmill 4 years ago and that little battery is still running 2026.  Great equipment there on sale and great prices","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mikey Reading","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4DHrhYGOVqoq7NuVGSfviUguOaCcsdr_9uQhQp958hO214w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Circled the store for almost 30 minutes trying to find 1 item listed as being on wall 22, no one approached me, no one said even enquired if I was looking for anything or needed assistance in any way. Ultimately not one staff member said thanks for coming in as I finally gave up and exited the store. Stay clear and take your business elsewhere","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Janelle Keogh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL9p-bOWX418tvxQcWpwgMSrcU1MfLr-1ahos61MrDN9pQlew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We had an unfortunate incident occur while we were on the highway, and needed a new rooftop carrier. We were fortunate enough to have Princess Auto be willing to put one on hold for us until we arrived the next day to pick it up. They allowed us to use one of their 3 foot step ladders to swap the old carrier for the new one and reload it. The young fellow that was out with us was so friendly, as was the manager that we dealt with. Thanks again for all your help!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kyle Tkachuk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLQwscxXob_OoakVdgkhHcGGyA3HzKRk7ZJLG0RgFosLs8RBw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Princess Auto is one of those stores where they probably have almost anything you could possibly think of.  Tools, gardening, farming, automotive, truck and trailer parts, lights and accessories.  Welding, hydraulics,  equipment, hunting, fishing, camping supplies.   I'm sure you get the idea.   But honestly you have to check it out if you have never been in to any of their stores.
Super friendly and knowledgeable staff, and all in all, just one of my favorite stores.
Plus they have premixed 40:1 and 50:1 two cycle fuel.   I find it really handy to keep one kicking around because if I don't have much sawing to do it saves me mixing up a full can of fuel.   And it seems to not turn sour as fast either.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDC_PT63gE&fid=0x0:0x70e916532c1f35e4"],"When":"2020-9-19"}]

And I love my new Traeger! Right after I seasoned it we did Buffalo chicken thighs then pulled pork the next night! Wifire is slick!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICaxtrPlwE&fid=0x0:0x363d1f8612378420"],"When":"2021-7-30"},{"Name":"Irv David","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKCHoPRV_LdUyburevqZ2x84Q9JjLOhTrKTryPoK7Mpqquhpg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"When we moved here we were told this was a great store for everything Traeger. My Traeger recently broke down. Fan motor and fire pot likely. So I attended and wow what a selection… seems like 20plus Traegers on hand. So I go and ask for some help along with a pic of the one I have. “Yeah. Without the model number I can’t tell you what you need… call Traeger they might even FaceTime you to figure out the problem. Once you do that we can order the parts for you”

Now I’m no rocket scientist but I also know the Traeger is very simple in design which is repeated over and over. Fine. I’ll go figure all this out and damn if I’m coming back to pay retail if you can’t help. The opportunity to go above and beyond was there and they didn’t want to do so.

So twenty minutes later I have the model and find the parts online for less than $100 delivered. AND as I thought, the parts are very universal - they don’t really change from one to the other.

This is what happens all too often in Prince George when I try to “shop local”.","Images":null,"When":""}]
